raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weeta/ pee tecm Amarreem ra
Namna Wahrtu/un teem buhs
to Nammu apkoht/ teem buhs
tohs Dedsamo-Uppurus un zit-
tus Uppurus preefsch teem Lau-
dim nokant/ un winnu Preek-
cha stahweht teem kalpoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz la tee winneem
irr kalpojuschi winnu Suhdu-
Deetu Preekcha/ un irr tam I-
sraëta Namnam par Peedaust-
schanu tahs Noseedsibas biju-
schi. Tapehz efmu es Jawu Roh-
ku prett teem issteepis/ fakka tag
Kungs KUNGS: Ra teem buhs
tawu Noseegumu nest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un teem ne buhs pee man
flaht eet/ to Preestexo Amattu
preeksch man darriht/ un pee-eet
pee wiſfahm mannahm fweh-
tahm Leetahm/ pee tahm twiffu-
fwehtakahm Leetahm/ bet teem
buhs Jawu Kaunu nest/ un fa-
waz Negantibas/ fo tee irr dar-
rijtcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz eezeltchu es tohs
par Sargeem to Nammu far-
gaht pee wiſfa winna Darba/un
pee wiſfa/ kas eeksch ta buhs ja-
darra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet to Lewitu Preestexi/
Zahdaka Behrni/ kas to Sarga-
tchanu mannas fwehtas Weetas
irr turrejschi/ kad tee Israëta
Behrni no mannin nomaldi-
jahs/ teem buhs pee man flaht
eet man kalpoht / un manná
Preekcha stahweht/tohs Tankus
un Affini man uppureht/ fakka
as Kungs KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Leetih buhs manna fi
tâ Weetâ ee-eet/ un teem
pee manna Galda klaht eet
kalpoht/ un teem buhs ma
Sargaschanu turreht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee pee ta eek-
ja Pagalnija Wahrtim nat
tad buhs teem linnu Drehbes
wilft/ bet Willaf teem ne b
flaht nahkt / kad tee eeksch
eekcheja. Pagalnija Wahrt
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Linnu Puſchkaireem b
us winnu Galwahm buht/
linnu Ubfahm buhs us win
Gurneem buht/un teem ne b
Sweedrds apjohsteez.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee ahreja Pag
ma iseet/ prohti us to ahr
Pagalnui pee teem Laudim/
buhs teem Jawas Drehbes/ ar
tee irr kalpojuschi/ tewilft/
tahs eeksch teem fwehteem Ra
bareem nolikt/ un teem buhs
tas Drehbes apiwilft/ ka tee ta
Laudis ne fwehti Jawas Dre-
bês.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un teem ne buhs fat
Galwu gluddent nods iht / ne
arri Jawas Bisas likt gaert
angt / bet teem buhs Jaw-
Mattus greesin nogreest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir neweenam Prees
cam buhs Wihnu dsert/ kad tee
eekcheja Pagalma ja-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teem arrtosan ne bu
nekahdu Atraatni nedg Atschk
tu few par Seewahm nemt/
iannas Junprawas no ta Dsi-
umma ta Israëta Namuna/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
